creator: serge.gagnon@b2b2c.ca
text:
WebCit is a Web-based, AJAX-enabled frontend to the Citadel
groupware/collaboration system. It is an attractive Web middleware
layer that allows user-friendly access. By combining WebCit and
Citadel, you can have a versatile online environment with many users
concurrently accessing the same system using the user interface of
their choice (text, Web, or downloaded client software).

Bug:
        - I18n doesn't work at this time. If you want to work at this,
        just comment "--disable-nls" in the port's Makefile and follow
        the error after typing make build.

WWW: http://easyinstall.citadel.org/

This port required citadel v.6.84 PR ports/103536 to work
